---
name: Question
about: How do I do X? Is Y supported?
title: "[question] "
labels: question
---

**Question**
What you're trying to do.

**What you've already tried**
Code snippets, links to README sections you've read, or `api.tezaurs.lv` responses you've compared against.

**Note**
For general "how does Latvian morphology work" questions, the [LU MII Tēzaurs documentation](https://tezaurs.lv) and the upstream Java repo at <https://github.com/PeterisP/morphology> are better resources. This issue tracker is for vardene-specific questions.
